title: BC-02 — Academic Management
description: Data contract for the Academic Management Bounded Context. Defines Student and Professor aggregates with their value objects, registration commands, and read models. Covers student registration (HU-15) and professor registration (HU-21).

Student.description: Aggregate Root. Student enrolled in a graduate program. Aggregates personal data and academic information. Maintains an ID-based reference to their faculty advisor (Professor) and to their User account in BC-06. Derived from HU-15.

enrollmentId.description: Matrícula — unique institutional enrollment identifier. E.g. '2123803361'.

userId.description: ID-based reference to User aggregate in BC-06 Identity & Access. Not a direct object reference (DDD aggregate boundary).

graduateProgramId.description: ID-based reference to GraduateProgram in BC-04 Program Configuration. Multi-tenant scope.

advisorId.description: ID-based reference to the assigned Professor (advisor). Nullable until assigned.

Professor.description: Aggregate Root. Academic staff member who teaches courses and advises students. Identified by institutional employee number. Derived from HU-21.

userId.description: ID-based reference to User aggregate in BC-06 Identity & Access.

graduateProgramId.description: ID-based reference to GraduateProgram in BC-04.

PersonalData.description: Value Object shared by Student and Professor aggregates within this BC. Contains identity data of a person.

secondLastName.description: Apellido Materno — maternal last name. Optional.

nationality.description: Nationality. E.g. 'Mexicana'. Required for students, optional for professors.

AcademicInformation.description: Value Object exclusive to Student. Contains data about the student's academic program.

undergraduateDegree.description: Carrera de Licenciatura — original undergraduate degree.

admissionDate.description: Date the student was admitted to the graduate program.

RegisterStudentCommand.description: Command to register a new student. Executed by COORDINATOR. Orchestrates: validate uniqueness → generate password (PasswordGenerationService) → hash password (PasswordEncoderPort from BC-06) → create User with STUDENT role (BC-06) → create Student aggregate → persist. Single transaction. Returns entity + one-time plaintext password.

email.description: Unique email for login. Validated for uniqueness against BC-06.

RegisterProfessorCommand.description: Command to register a new professor. Executed by COORDINATOR. Orchestrates: validate uniqueness → generate password → hash → create User with PROFESSOR role (BC-06) → create Professor aggregate → persist. Single transaction.

StudentResponse.description: Read model for student data. Returned on registration and queries.

generatedPassword.description: One-time plaintext password. Only returned on registration, never on queries.
One-time plaintext password. Only returned on registration.
